skills.name: anti-patterns
skills.description: Detects common coding anti-patterns and suggests better alternatives

skills.name: anti-slop
skills.description: A deterministic anti-pattern detector that catches 41 common AI-generated design mistakes and enforces professional design quality.

skills.name: architect
skills.description: Decomposes structured specs into executable task units following the RED/GREEN/REFACTOR/VERIFY pattern.

skills.name: caveman-mode
skills.description: Terse-output mode. Strips filler, hedging, and scaffolding from agent responses to cut output tokens while preserving every technical fact, number, and code token. Ported from the community `caveman` skill (JuliusBrussee/caveman) into this repo's JS-module + tests convention.

skills.name: checkpoints
skills.description: Milestone-based progress tracking with checkpoints

skills.name: code-explainer
skills.description: Explains code in plain English by analyzing structure and patterns

skills.name: code-health

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Detailed code review with line-level feedback and suggestions

skills.name: code-translator
skills.description: Translate code between programming languages — maps common patterns

skills.name: color-gen
skills.description: Generates WCAG-compliant color palettes with accessibility considerations. Supports brand color expansion, semantic color systems, and comprehensive contrast checking.

skills.name: context-memory
skills.description: Persistent context across sessions — remembers preferences and decisions

skills.name: dashboard
skills.description: Visual project progress dashboard — reads tracker data and renders status

skills.name: design-system
skills.description: A skill for managing and applying design tokens and themed components.

skills.name: diff-preview
skills.description: Visual diff visualization for code changes. Perfect for reviewing code modifications, understanding updates, and comparing versions.

skills.name: done-checklist
skills.description: Production-ready checklist — tells non-coders if their project is ready to ship

skills.name: done-verifier
skills.description: 14-point checklist verifying a feature is truly production-ready before shipping

skills.name: error-translator
skills.description: Convert technical error messages to plain English — references MDN and common patterns

skills.name: flowchart-gen
skills.description: Auto-generate architecture diagrams from code structure. Transform your codebase into visual flowcharts for documentation, planning, and understanding complex systems.

skills.name: git-free-deploy
skills.description: Deploy static sites without git — wraps surge.sh, npx serve, and Netlify Drop

skills.name: git-ops
skills.description: Git operations without CLI knowledge — wraps git CLI

skills.name: graphify
skills.description: Faithful port of safishamsi/graphify (https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify) — turns a folder of source files into a queryable dependency graph, tagging every edge EXTRACTED (found directly in source, confidence 1.0), INFERRED (a reasonable guess with a confidence score), or AMBIGUOUS (low-confidence, flagged for review). `analyze()`'s existing node/edge shape (`{from, to, type}`) is unchanged — every method below is additive and composes on top of its output.

skills.name: gsd-workflow
skills.description: Faithful port of GSD's (Get Shit Done, https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done) Define → Build → Ship lifecycle into this project's milestone → phase → task structure. Composes with the existing `.gsd/` milestone files and `lib/vibe-commands/break.js` rather than reimplementing them — this skill recommends _which_ GSD command to run next and validates the atomic-commit and wave-resume guarantees; it does not replace milestone file generation.

skills.name: guardrails
skills.description: Safety confirmations for destructive actions — prevents accidents

skills.name: health-check
skills.description: Check if your project dependencies and environment are healthy

skills.name: impeccable-audit
skills.description: A design quality workflow ported from the community `impeccable` skill (`pbakaus/impeccable`). Where `anti-slop` is purely a detector library, this skill adds impeccable's actual command structure: a one-time `init` that captures design context, plus `critique` (UX review) and `polish` (shipping-readiness) passes that sit on either side of the detector-based `audit`.

skills.name: intent-capture
skills.description: Extract structured project specs from natural language descriptions

skills.name: knowledge-base
skills.description: Project documentation generator — creates README, API docs, and guides

skills.name: model-router
skills.description: Route tasks to optimal AI models based on capability and cost

skills.name: nexus
skills.description: 3 orchestration modes (Graph, Router, Adaptive). MCP + A2A protocol support. 100+ LLM providers.

skills.name: nit
skills.description: Auto-detects your stack and generates tests. Covers unit, integration, and E2E with self-healing selectors.

skills.name: one-click-netlify
skills.description: Deploy any project to Netlify — wraps the Netlify CLI

skills.name: one-click-vercel

skills.name: planning-agent

skills.name: project-wizard

skills.name: prompt-templates
skills.description: Pre-built, copy-paste prompt templates for common development tasks. These templates are designed to work with AI coding assistants and can be customized for your specific needs.

skills.name: quick-start
skills.description: One-command project scaffolding for vibe coders. Get your project up and running in seconds.

skills.name: rollback

skills.name: screenshot-preview

skills.name: task-coordinator

skills.name: taste-skill
skills.description: Faithful port of Leonxlnx/taste-skill (https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) — gives the agent "good taste" by parameterizing layout risk, motion, and density through three dials, and enforcing the framework's hard, mechanically-checkable anti-slop rules (em-dash ban, duplicate-CTA-intent, hero/eyebrow discipline). Composes with `skills/design/anti-slop` for color/typography/layout coverage it already has — this skill does not re-implement those.

skills.name: tdd-vibe
skills.description: Simplified TDD workflow for vibe coders — test-first without the jargon

skills.name: template-gallery

skills.name: testing-guide
skills.description: Generates test case suggestions for your code

skills.name: theme-factory
skills.description: Generates custom theme configurations with colors, fonts, and design tokens. Supports dark, light, and custom themes with accessibility compliance.

skills.name: tracker
skills.description: Tracks tasks through a visual kanban board (todo → in-progress → review → done)

skills.name: typography-rules
skills.description: Typography best practices including font pairing rules, hierarchy guidelines, and systematic approaches to type selection for professional design.

skills.name: verification
skills.description: Verifies that behavior matches the project spec and requirements

skills.name: vibe-review
